stemHtml: While in foreign airspace, an aircraft is carrying out a search and rescue operation. Some seamen are rescued but they can not speak any English, so the crewman are not able to brief the seamen properly on safety equipment when they are brought on board. As this is required in Part III of ICAO Annex 6, which of the following is correct?

options.a: Part III can be ignored to the extent necessary for the preservation of life.
options.b: The crew must comply with Part III as fully as is practicable in the circumstances.
options.c: Part III does NOT apply to search and rescue operations in any way.
options.d: Part III requires the carriage of pictorial briefing cards for passengers, which should be located before bringing the seamen on board.
